## Description

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test coverage

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes locally
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` is clean locally
- [ ] `cargo fmt` has been applied
- [ ] Documentation has been updated if needed
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for new behavior
